INJURIES.name: Dead
INJURIES.text: Remove from the warband; all equipment lost.

INJURIES.name: Multiple Injuries
INJURIES.text: Roll D6× on this table (re-roll Dead/Captured/Multiple).

INJURIES.name: Leg Wound
INJURIES.text: Movement permanently −1.

INJURIES.name: Arm Wound (1: arm amputated)
INJURIES.text: Severe arm wound: may only use a single one-handed weapon from now on.

INJURIES.name: Arm Wound (2–6: misses next game)
INJURIES.text: Light arm wound: misses the next game (tracked via the Out counter).

INJURIES.name: Madness (1–3: Stupidity)
INJURIES.text: Suffers from Stupidity (permanent).

INJURIES.name: Madness (4–6: Frenzy)
INJURIES.text: Suffers from Frenzy (permanent).

INJURIES.name: Smashed Leg (1: may not run)
INJURIES.text: May no longer run (but may still charge).

INJURIES.name: Smashed Leg (2–6: misses next game)
INJURIES.text: Misses the next game (tracked via the Out counter).

INJURIES.name: Chest Wound
INJURIES.text: Toughness permanently −1.

INJURIES.name: Blinded in one eye
INJURIES.text: Ballistic Skill permanently −1. Blinded again → must retire.

INJURIES.name: Old Battle Wound
INJURIES.text: At the start of each game roll a D6: on a 1 he cannot fight this game.

INJURIES.name: Nervous Condition
INJURIES.text: Initiative permanently −1.

INJURIES.name: Hand Injury
INJURIES.text: Weapon Skill permanently −1.

INJURIES.name: Deep Wound
INJURIES.text: Misses the next D3 games (does nothing meanwhile).

INJURIES.name: Robbed
INJURIES.text: All weapons, armour and equipment lost.

INJURIES.name: Full Recovery
INJURIES.text: No lasting damage.

INJURIES.name: Bitter Enmity
INJURIES.text: Hatred (D6: the attacker / his leader / his warband / all of that type).

INJURIES.name: Captured
INJURIES.text: Captured by the enemy — ransom, exchange or sale (D6×5 gc).

INJURIES.name: Hardened
INJURIES.text: Immune to fear from now on.

INJURIES.name: Horrible Scars
INJURIES.text: Causes fear from now on.

INJURIES.name: Sold to the Pits
INJURIES.text: Must fight a Pit Fighter (see rulebook).

INJURIES.name: Survives Against the Odds
INJURIES.text: +1 Experience.
